items.titolo: A Guided Tour of Donald Trump’s Renovated Washington, DC
items.descrizione: Trump has remade the nation’s capitol in his own image. Ahead of the Fourth of July, WIRED guides you through the dizzying effects of DC’s makeover.

items.titolo: Gemini usa Gmail e Google Foto per creare immagini personalizzate
items.descrizione: Gemini può generare immagini personalizzate analizzando Foto, Gmail, YouTube e Search. Ecco come funziona la nuova funzione gratuita. The post Gemini usa Gmail e Google Foto per creare immagini personalizzate appeared fi

items.titolo: Claude Helped a Hacker Find a Way to Issue Tickets to Almost Every US Music Festival
items.descrizione: A researcher found that using Anthropic’s Claude Opus 4.7, he could break into the website of Front Gate—used by every festival from Lollapalooza to Bonnaroo—and freely issue any ticket he chose.
